case_title: DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION VS. RANDALL WONZER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 - SERVED AUG-19-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONZER, RANDALL
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT WONZER, RANDALL
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $5,225.79 RE 36456 FOR TRANSACTION W0520A26D008 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION, DOC#1910697045, WARRANT #38206500, DATED DEC-03-2020
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WONZER, RANDALL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. SEE NOTES (SIGNED BY PLAINTIFF: DAN HOLLAND-MCCANN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT WONZER, RANDALL AS TO PLAINTIFF DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 06/29/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DANN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCCANN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RANDAL WONZER IS PRESENT. CARRIE WONZER, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. COURT DETERMINES THAT THERE IS NO MERIT TO DEFENDANTS CLAIM. COURT TAKES A RECESS AT 10:30 A.M. TO ALLOW FOR DISCOVERY REVIEW OF PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY EVIDENCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS DOCUMENTS ARE REVIEWED BY DEFENDANTS. TRIAL RESUMES AT 11:00 A.M. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON SEP-23-2020 IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF DANN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCCANN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RANDAL WONZER IS PRESENT. CARRIE WONZER, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. COURT DETERMINES THAT THERE IS NO MERIT TO DEFENDANTS CLAIM. COURT TAKES A RECESS AT 10:30 A.M. TO ALLOW FOR DISCOVERY REVIEW OF PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY EVIDENCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS DOCUMENTS ARE REVIEWED BY DEFENDANTS. COURT RESUMES AT 11:00 A.M. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WONZER, RANDALL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT WONZER, RANDALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY WONZER, RANDALL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED SEP-16-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAN MCCANN CONSTRUCTION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONZER, RANDALL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
